words.def: Before the singular of an object that starts with a consonant.
words.ex: He saw a famous person today.

words.def: To refer to the person who is speaking or writing.
words.ex: I saw her with some books.

words.def: Before the singular of an object that starts with a vowel.
words.ex: An orange rolled off the hill yesterday.

words.def: Before any amount of an object that starts with any letter.
words.ex: They ate 4 of the green apples.

words.def: A feline animal with four legs and a tail that is fluffy and commonly does an action called purring and makes a "meow" sound.
words.ex: Those cats were sitting in a red box.

words.def: A canine animal similar to a cat that instead makes a "bark" sound that sounds like "woof".
words.ex: She saw a dog walking by the playground.

words.def: A cloud on the ground, usually at high places
words.ex: He is driving into the fog.

words.def: A type of plant that can only be green and produces seeds and dies usally at the end of spring or early summer.
words.ex: They were harvesting the herbs a week ago.

words.def: Usually refers to a mean person who hurt the speaker physically or emotionally.
words.ex: He was foul and mean yesterday.

words.def: A succession of rulers or leaders who all belong to the same family.
words.ex: They started a dynasty thousands of years ago.

words.def: A project that multiple people worked on.
words.ex: The collaboration is due next week.

words.def: A math equation that has many numbers and variables.
words.ex: He was solving a hard polynomial today.

words.def: The process of configuring a device to increase its accuracy.
words.ex: The thermometer needed calibration before used.
